name: Cloud Escape
short_description: CLOUD ESCAPE is a fast-paced 3D precision platformer with countless traps, obstacles and cool movement mechanics.
detailed_description:
CLOUD ESCAPE is a fast-paced 3D precision platformer with countless traps, obstacles and cool movement mechanics. Whether you're dashing through the large, themed areas in Classic Mode or trying to climb to the top in the new game mode: The Tower.

Both game modes have their own worlds with unique challenges, traps, secrets and collectibles. In the new tower, you'll even encounter real enemies for the first time!



  • Classic: Five large, themed areas playable on two difficulty settings
  • The Tower: Climb to the top of the gigantic tower featuring loads of new challenges
  • Many unlockable characters
  • Different collectibles like coins, gems or hidden keys
  • Full keyboard/mouse and gamepad support
  • New enemies, new dangers
  • Countless traps, obstacles and cool movement mechanics
  • Integrated timers for speedrunners and achievement hunters
  • Find and collect secret stars in each mode to unlock achievements
  • Physics-based characters and environments allow for unique obstacles and mechanics

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Dutch, Russian
